description: Jane Fonda Testifies to Robert Redford’s Irresistibility at TCM Film Festival — ‘I Asked Him, “Do You Ever Have Affairs?”‘ — and Says She Was Kidding About Wanting Streisand’s Oscars Slot  VarietyJane Fonda Recalls “Painful” Crush on Robert Redford and Walks Back Comment on Streisand’s Oscars Tribute: “Bob Would Have Liked It”  The Hollywood ReporterJane Fonda Tributes Late Co-Star Robert Redford At TCM Classic Film Festival Opening: “I Had Such A Crush On Him It Was Painful”  DeadlineJane Fonda clarifies her Barbra Streisand shade about Robert Redford's Oscars tribute: 'I thought I was being funny'  AOL.comJane Fonda clears air over Streisand’s Oscar tribute to Robert Redford  USA Today
